taskTemplates.name: Bug Hunt
taskTemplates.text: Search for obvious bugs in this project. List each bug with file path and suggested fix.

taskTemplates.name: Code Review
taskTemplates.text: Review the recent changes in this project for code quality, security, and performance issues.

taskTemplates.name: Refactor Entry
taskTemplates.text: Refactor the main entry point for better readability and maintainability.

taskTemplates.name: Add Tests
taskTemplates.text: Add unit tests for the core logic. Use the existing test framework.
